title: Bitfarms Profit Margins 2019-2025 Analysis
text: Bitfarms profit margin analysis from 2019 to 2025 shows significant volatility in company financial performance. Net profit margin as of March 31, 2025 was -40.09%, reflecting challenges in achieving profitability despite revenue growth. Full year 2025 revenue reached $229 million, up 72% year-over-year, yet company posted significant net losses. Q3 2025 results showed gross mining margin of 35% with operating loss of $29 million and net loss of $46 million. Company's margin compression reflects transition period from Bitcoin mining focus to HPC/AI infrastructure. Earlier periods showed higher gross mining margins when Bitcoin prices were more favorable. 2022 adjusted EBITDA was $52 million on $142 million revenue. 2023 adjusted EBITDA was $35 million on $146 million revenue with 44% gross mining margin. 2024 showed improvement with multiple quarters achieving gross mining margins above 40% before compression in 2025. Strategic pivot toward HPC/AI aims to unlock higher and more stable margins in future periods through diversified revenue streams.
